Patch Set 1:

(3 comments)

I can't give this +1 since I'm not at all familiar with this code, and have the same concerns that Olaf does, where list_for_each_entry() is not always safe.  The patch _seems_ OK to me, but prefer that someone with more LNet experience review this.
